title: Explainability in Practice: A Survey of Explainable NLP Across Various Domains
description: Code, figures, and supplementary materials for the survey of explainable NLP across healthcare, finance, customer-relationship management, systematic reviews, and conversational AI. Archived snapshot for the v1.0-thesis release accompanying the doctoral thesis Let Me Explain! Explainable NLP for Understanding Large Language Models (Utrecht University, 2026).
